description: Perform a hydraulic quality assurance audit on the Muncie HEC-RAS model (Plan 04) to verify that the computed Friction Slope is mathematically consistent with the input Manning's n value for the Main Channel. For every cross-section at the time of peak flow, calculate the effective roughness ($n_{calc}$) using the US Customary Manning's Equation: $n_{calc} = \frac{1.486}{V_{ch}} (R_{ch})^{2/3} (S_f)^{1/2}$. Compare the calculated value to the input Manning's n ($n_{input}$) and document the results in ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/roughness_audit.csv. The output must contain the columns: River_Station, Channel_Velocity_fps, Channel_Hydraulic_Radius_ft, Friction_Slope, Input_Manning_n, Calculated_Manning_n, Residual ($|n_{input} - n_{calc}|$), and Status (set to 'PASS' if Residual < 0.001, otherwise 'FAIL').
